Table DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION

Card of table DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION

Name

DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION

Code

DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION

---------------------- Pseudocode ----------------------------------

 

 

 

1. Initialize a new table in the Presentation Layer in "DB_CONS_PL_(env)" under "PL_INTERACTION" schema

called "DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION".

 

2. Define the Columns, based on the script provided.

 

3. Define the Constraints

Primary Key (Unique Record Identifier):

DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION_KEY = MD5(Concatenation of(ID, MARKET_CODE))

 

 

4. Save the table definition.

 

5. Maintain Data Dictionary

i. Add the column description to each column (from Comment tab in PD).

ii. Mention the Data Classification & PII category for each column and mask them as per standard guideline.

 

6. The data in the target object must stay deduplicated.

 

8. Follow the Entity & Attribute level Business Rules defined.

 

9. Run the RLS specific script based on the MARKET_CODE (applicable for QAS & Prod).

 

 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------- Load Type -----------------------------------------------------------------

APPEND

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

 


Check constraint name of the table DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION

CKT_DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION


Server validation rule of the table DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION

drop table DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION
--==============================================================
create or replace table PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION (
DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_DEVICE_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_DCS_DEVICE_KEY TEXT not null,
ID TEXT not null,
DEVICEID TEXT,
CODENTIFYID TEXT,
REGISTEREDON DATE,
OWNERID TEXT,
RETAILERID TEXT,
CALLCENTERID TEXT,
TOUCHPOINTID TEXT,
COMPONENTID TEXT,
STAFFID TEXT,
SESSIONID TEXT,
DONEBY TEXT,
CREATEDON DATE,
REPORTTIMESTAMP DATE,
MARKET_CODE TEXT not null,
constraint PK_DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION primary key (DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION.DCS_DEVICE_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION.DCS_DCS_DEVICE_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION.ID is
'Device identifier (guid). ';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION.DEVICEID is
'Device Identifier on UDD';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION.CODENTIFYID is
'Unique code of device';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION.OWNERID is
'Consumer Identifier';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION.RETAILERID is
'DCS user unique identifier that placed the order - Backend user (when order is placed through retailer)';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION.CALLCENTERID is
'DCS user unique identifier (if device registered by call center agent)';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION.TOUCHPOINTID is
'ID of the touchpoint (POS) assigned to the activity';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION.COMPONENTID is
'Component idenfitier';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION.STAFFID is
'ID of the staff assigned to the activity on the device';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION.SESSIONID is
'ID of the session assigned to the activity on the device';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION.DONEBY is
'If is set it contains the user_id of the user did the change';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION.MARKET_CODE is
'Identifier for the Market -> 2 letter Country Code + ''04''';

alter table PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION
add constraint FK_DCS_DEVI_R23_DEVIC_DCS_DEVI foreign key (DCS_DEVICE_KEY)
references PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICE (DCS_DEVICE_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICEREGISTRATION
add constraint FK_DCS_DEVI_R31_DEVIC_DCS_DEVI foreign key (DCS_DCS_DEVICE_KEY)
references PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICE (DCS_DEVICE_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;
